case_title: ALVIN B. CHAN, INC. vs. TOSTA, ELMER et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CLARENCE J. MOY RE: BREACH OF STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDG. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALVIN B. CHAN, INC.
